title: Análise Experimental (Rodadas R1–R5)
description: Comparação entre rodadas experimentais: latência, throughput, edge computing e fault injection

list.name: round_id
list.label: Rodada
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT round_id FROM batch_metrics ORDER BY round_id

list.name: load_level
list.label: Carga
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT load_level FROM batch_metrics ORDER BY load_level

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  round_id,
  ROUND(avg(e2e_latency_ms)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Avg E2E (ms)",
  ROUND(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e2e_latency_ms)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "P95 (ms)"
FROM batch_metrics
WHERE e2e_latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND ('$round_id' = 'All' OR round_id IN ($round_id))
GROUP BY round_id
ORDER BY round_id

panels.title: Avg Throughput por Nível de Carga

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  load_level,
  ROUND(avg(input_rows_per_sec)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Input rows/s",
  ROUND(avg(proc_rows_per_sec)::NUMERIC, 2)  AS "Processed rows/s"
FROM batch_metrics
WHERE input_rows_per_sec > 0
  AND ('$load_level' = 'All' OR load_level IN ($load_level))
GROUP BY load_level
ORDER BY load_level

panels.title: Latência E2E — Edge Computing vs Cloud

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(batch_timestamp, $__interval, NULL),
  avg(e2e_latency_ms) FILTER (WHERE edge_computing = false) AS "Cloud (edge=false)",
  avg(e2e_latency_ms) FILTER (WHERE edge_computing = true)  AS "Edge Computing"
FROM batch_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(batch_timestamp)
  AND e2e_latency_ms IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Fault Injection — Eventos Esperados vs Recuperados

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(batch_timestamp, $__interval, NULL),
  avg(events_expected)  AS "Esperados",
  avg(events_recovered) AS "Recuperados"
FROM batch_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(batch_timestamp)
  AND fault_injected = true
  AND events_expected IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  round_id                                                                              AS "Rodada",
  load_level                                                                            AS "Carga",
  trigger_interval_ms                                                                   AS "Trigger (ms)",
  spark_cpus                                                                            AS "CPUs",
  edge_computing                                                                        AS "Edge?",
  COUNT(*)                                                                              AS "Batches",
  ROUND(avg(e2e_latency_ms)::NUMERIC, 1)                                               AS "Avg E2E (ms)",
  ROUND(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY e2e_latency_ms)::NUMERIC, 1)      AS "P95 E2E (ms)",
  ROUND(avg(input_rows_per_sec)::NUMERIC, 1)                                           AS "Input rows/s",
  ROUND(avg(proc_rows_per_sec)::NUMERIC, 1)                                            AS "Proc rows/s",
  SUM(CASE WHEN fault_injected THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                      AS "Batches c/ Falha"
FROM batch_metrics
WHERE e2e_latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND ('$round_id' = 'All' OR round_id IN ($round_id))
  AND ('$load_level' = 'All' OR load_level IN ($load_level))
GROUP BY round_id, load_level, trigger_interval_ms, spark_cpus, edge_computing
ORDER BY round_id, load_level
